results.owner_or_reason: Zero build gaps (gaps-pjacNq8SQY.json verdict_summary): ADR itself not a coverage-index key, but every build obligation it names maps to covered orvex-studio-workflows FR ids in coverage-index.json — FR-W14 (ENG-2493/ENG-2620), FR-W3 (ENG-2480/ENG-2639), FR-W18 (ENG-2487/ENG-2488/ENG-2638/ENG-2639), FR-W6 (ENG-2499/ENG-2626/2627/2628), A-W1 (ENG-2626).
